title: The Nosferatu Project
overview: In his motherland's race to claim the first human spaceflight, cosmonaut candidate Lev Leps is assigned to a secret project which involves an outrageous experiment.

title: The Path to Becoming a Cosmonaut
overview: Lev takes Irina through the cosmonaut training routine. While she surprises Lev and Anya in some aspects, other areas give her trouble.

title: Night Flight
overview: As the voices opposing Irina's existence become louder and louder, Lev comes up with a special plan to help overcome her fear of heights.

title: A Promise by the Lake
overview: With less than a month until launch, Lev takes Irina into town for a little fun before she dives into days of solitude training.

title: Training Separately
overview: While Irina undergoes her solitude training, a visitor from Sangrad with special interest in N44 has come to watch the candidates train.

title: Nosferatu
overview: A terrible dream leaves Irina shaken and unable to continue training. As Anya and Lev try to get her back on track, there's even more bad news about the test flight.

title: Lycoris Cooking Show
overview: Though Lev is confined due to his actions, the launch must go on as scheduled. As Irina takes to the skies, those on the ground pray for a successful mission.

title: A Maiden's Prayer
overview: Now that the test launch is over, Lev is given new orders. His training pulls him apart from Irina who falls into Anya's care over New Years.

title: The White Rose of Sangrad
overview: An incident during training sheds some light on Roza's fierce attitude. And after a long time apart, Irina has something important to tell Lev.

title: A Cold Spring
overview: Irina and Lev spend some time together before they're pulled apart. As the launch date quickly closes in, the decision is made as to who will pilot the first human spaceflight.

title: Lies and Truths
overview: As Lev prepares for space, he discovers that Irina has been lying to him. Worried about her, Lev expresses his gratitude in the only way that he can.

title: To the New World
overview: With the whole world listening, Lev wants to make sure Irina isn't forgotten. But the Delivery Crew has their own plans for Irina and plots to seize her during the ceremony.
